name: ai-operations-template
description: ForgeOps — a synthetic-data demo console for visually building, simulating, and exporting AI agent workflow graphs, built on the ai-operations-template engine: an autonomous, Claude-Code-driven AI coding factory governed by file-based guardrails.

scripts.test: node --test src/health.test.js src/forge/promptToGraph.test.ts src/forge/rbac.test.ts src/forge/exportArtifacts.test.ts src/forge/abSim.test.ts src/forge/canEdit.test.ts src/forge/demoAuth.test.ts
scripts.seed: node -e "console.log('[seed] in-memory demo data via lib/seed.ts — no database to seed')"
